description: Plan and configure a ceremonial Fleet Review in the Solent. The scenario requires a line of 5 anchored vessels starting at 50° 44.50' N, 001° 08.00' W, extending on a bearing of 115° True with 0.4 Nautical Mile spacing and a heading of 295°. The reviewing vessel, 'Royal Yacht', must be positioned on a parallel track exactly 0.2 Nautical Miles South of the fleet line, starting 0.5 NM before the first ship and traveling at 10 knots on a heading of 115°. Configure the scenario files (environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini) within the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/r) Spithead Fleet Review/'. Additionally, document the time offsets (MM:SS) for passing each of the 5 ships beam-to-beam in a schedule file at '/home/ga/Documents/review_schedule.txt', using T=00:00 for the moment the first ship is passed.
